    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProgramElement
    KeYRecoderMapping.toRecoder(ProgramElement pe)
    returns the Recoder-equivalent to a given ProgramElement (KeY).
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java with parameters of type ProgramElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Object
    Recoder2KeYConverter.callConvert(ProgramElement pe)
    convert a recoder ProgramElement to a corresponding KeY data structure entity.
    ProgramElement
    Recoder2KeYConverter.process(ProgramElement pe)
     
    ProgramElement
    KeYRecoderMapping.toKeY(ProgramElement pe)
    returns a matching ProgramElement (KeY) to a given ProgramElement (Recoder)

    Methods in recoder.convenience that return ProgramElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final ProgramElement
    AbstractTreeWalker.getProgramElement()
    Returns the current ProgramElement of the iteration, or null if there is no more element.
    ProgramElement
    ProgramElementWalker.getProgramElement()
    Returns the current ProgramElement of the iteration, or null if ProgramElementWalker.next()has not yet been called or has returned false.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    ASTIteratorListener.enteringNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
    This method is called whenever an AST node is entered.

    ASTIterator.iterate(ProgramElement pe)
    Performs a depth first search traversal through the given AST.
    void
    ASTIteratorAdapter.leavingNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
     
    void
    ASTIteratorListener.leavingNode(ASTIterator it, ProgramElement node)
    This method is called just before an AST node is left.
    protected void
    ASTIterator.recurse(ProgramElement pe)
    Recurses through the given AST in depth first search order.
    protected void
    AbstractTreeWalker.reset(ProgramElement root)
    Reset the walker reusing existing objects.
    void
    TreeWalker.reset(ProgramElement root)
    Reset the walker to a new start position reusing existing objects.

    ASTIteratorAdapter.returnedFromChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
     
    void
    ASTIteratorListener.returnedFromChildNode(ASTIterator it, NonTerminalProgramElement thisNode, ProgramElement childNode)
    Called immediately after the iterator returned from the child node.

    ASTIterator.simpleRecurse(ProgramElement pe)
    Recurses through the given AST in depth first search order.

    Format.toString(ProgramElement se)

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Declaration
    Declaration.
    interface 
    Expression
    General expression.
    interface 
    ExpressionContainer
    Expression container.
    interface 
    LoopInitializer
    Loop initializer.
    interface 
    NamedProgramElement
    Named program element.
    interface 
    NonTerminalProgramElement
    Non terminal program element.
    interface 
    ParameterContainer
    Describes program elements that contain ParameterDeclarations.
    interface 
    Reference
    References are uses of names, variables or members.
    interface 
    ScopeDefiningElement
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope.
    interface 
    Statement
    Statement.
    interface 
    StatementContainer
    Statement container.
    interface 
    TerminalProgramElement
    Terminal program element.
    interface 
    TypeScope
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for types.
    interface 
    VariableScope
    The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope for variables.

    Subinterfaces of ProgramElement in recoder.java.expression
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ExpressionStatement
    An ExpressionStatement is a statement that may appear as an expression.
    Classes in recoder.java.expression that implement ProgramElement
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ArrayInitializer
    An ArrayInitializer is a valid expression exclusively for initializing ArrayTypes.

    Assignment

    NameReference

  • Uses of ProgramElement in recoder.kit

    Methods in recoder.kit that return ProgramElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ProgramElement
    MiscKit.checkParentLinks(ProgramElement root)
    Query that checks if all parent links are made valid in the given subtree; useful for debugging purposes.
    static ProgramElement
    MiscKit.getClone(ProgramElement original, ProgramElement originalRoot, ProgramElement cloneRoot)
    Returns the element in the cloned tree corresponding to the original node in the original tree.
    ProgramElement
    StatementKit.ControlFlowWalker.getProgramElement()
     
    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type ProgramElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ProgramElement
    MiscKit.checkParentLinks(ProgramElement root)
    Query that checks if all parent links are made valid in the given subtree; useful for debugging purposes.
    static boolean
    MiscKit.contains(NonTerminalProgramElement root, ProgramElement node)
    Query checking if a given non terminal is identical to or an ancestor of the given node.
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(SourceInfo si, Type t, ProgramElement context)
    Factory method that creates a new type reference derived by the name of the given type and tries to minimize its qualification using the given context for the type reference.
    static String
    VariableKit.createValidVariableName(SourceInfo si, ProgramElement context)
    creates a new variable name which does not exist within the given scope.
    static String
    VariableKit.createValidVariableName(SourceInfo si, ProgramElement context, String guess)
    creates a new variable name which does not exist within the given scope using the given guess as a name base.
    static VariableDeclaration
    VariableKit.createVariableDeclaration(ServiceConfiguration sc, ProgramElement context, Type t)
    Creates a new local variable declaration with the given type and a new artificial name.
    static VariableDeclaration
    VariableKit.createVariableDeclaration(ServiceConfiguration sc, ProgramElement context, Type t, String guess)
    Deprecated.
    use createNewVariableName instead
    static VariableReference
    VariableKit.createVariableReference(SourceInfo si, Variable v, ProgramElement context)
    Factory method that creates a minimal qualified reference to the given variable (or field) for the given context.
    protected final void
    Transformation.detach(ProgramElement root)
    Detaches a subtree.
    static void
    Transformation.doDetach(ProgramElement root)
    Detaches a subtree without reporting.
    static void
    Transformation.doReplace(ProgramElement child, ProgramElement replacement)
    Replaces a single child by a different one without reporting.
    static Import
    UnitKit.ensureImport(ChangeHistory ch, SourceInfo si, String typeName, ProgramElement context)
    Deprecated.
    needs further testing - use at your own risks
    static void
    UnitKit.ensureImports(ChangeHistory ch, SourceInfo si, ProgramElement root)
    Deprecated.
    needs further testing - use at your own risks
    static ProgramElement
    MiscKit.getClone(ProgramElement original, ProgramElement originalRoot, ProgramElement cloneRoot)
    Returns the element in the cloned tree corresponding to the original node in the original tree.
    static CompilationUnit
    UnitKit.getCompilationUnit(ProgramElement p)
    Query that returns the compilation unit which the given program element is located in.
    static String
    VariableKit.getNewVariableName(SourceInfo si, Type type, ProgramElement context)
    Query method that finds a name for a new variable with the given type.
    static String[]
    VariableKit.getNewVariableNames(SourceInfo si, Type[] types, ProgramElement context)
    Query method that finds names for new variables with the given types.
    static CompilationUnit
    MiscKit.getParentCompilationUnit(ProgramElement pe)
    Deprecated.
    use UnitKit.getCompilationUnit instead
    static MemberDeclaration
    MiscKit.getParentMemberDeclaration(ProgramElement pe)
    Query returning the member declaration the given program element is contained within.
    static TypeDeclaration
    MiscKit.getParentTypeDeclaration(ProgramElement pe)
    Query returning the type declaration the given program element is contained within.
    static ScopeDefiningElement
    MiscKit.getScopeDefiningElement(ProgramElement pe)

    MiscKit.mapClones(ProgramElement originalRoot, ProgramElement cloneRoot, Map<ProgramElement,ProgramElement> map)
    Adds object mappings from original to cloned versions for each node in a tree to an existing map.

    MiscKit.remove(ChangeHistory ch, ProgramElement child)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by Transformation.replace

    MiscKit.replace(ChangeHistory ch, ProgramElement child, ProgramElement replacement)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by Transformation.replace

    Transformation.replace(ProgramElement child, ProgramElement replacement)
    Replaces a single child by a different one.

    Removes relative and absolute indentation information from the given tree.

    Description

    ChangeHistory.attached(ProgramElement root)
    Informs the change history of the addition of a new subtree given by its root element.
